name: feetech-omni-car
author: dorarobotics
description: Control a Feetech 3-wheel omni-directional chassis. Supports move, rotate, stop with optional duration.

tools.name: init_motors
tools.description: Initialize all three wheel motors: switch to Wheel Mode and enable torque. MUST be called once before any move_base or stop command.

tools.name: move_base
tools.description: Move the omni-wheel car. vx=forward/backward, vy=left/right lateral, omega=rotation. Values are internal speed ticks, range -1500 to 1500. Conversion: 1 tick ≈ 0.000077 m/s (e.g. 500 ticks ≈ 0.038 m/s, 1000 ticks ≈ 0.076 m/s, 1500 ticks ≈ 0.114 m/s). If duration_secs is provided, the car moves for that many seconds then stops automatically. Call init_motors first.

vx.description: Forward/backward speed in ticks. Positive = forward, negative = backward. Range: -1500 to 1500. 1 tick ≈ 0.000077 m/s.

vy.description: Left/right lateral speed in ticks. Positive = left, negative = right. Range: -1500 to 1500. 1 tick ≈ 0.000077 m/s.

omega.description: Rotation speed in ticks. Positive = counter-clockwise, negative = clockwise. Range: -1500 to 1500. 1 tick ≈ 0.000077 m/s.

duration_secs.description: Optional. If set, the car moves for this many seconds then stops automatically. Range: 0 to 30. If omitted, the car moves until a separate stop or move_base command is issued.

tools.name: stop
tools.description: Stop all wheels by commanding zero speed. Use robot_estop instead for safety-critical stops.

tools.name: robot_estop
tools.description: Emergency stop: immediately zero all wheel speeds and disable servo torque. After estop, init_motors must be called again before moving.
